modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request for creating a short URL for a long link

full_description_text:  
A field technician is looking to have a long URL shortened for easier sharing. They have reached out to request the creation of a new vanity or short URL for the specified link. This request is aimed at improving accessibility and usability for the intended audience.
short_description: Request for creating a short URL for a long link
description: A field technician is looking to have a long URL shortened for easier sharing. They have reached out to request the creation of a new vanity or short URL for the specified link. This request is aimed at improving accessibility and usability for the intended audience.
